possible_failure_mode: Patient acts on generated diagnosis or clinician over-trusts system.
guardrail: Do not present final diagnoses; use memory/uncertainty language; require clinician review.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

possible_failure_mode: Too many flags cause important signals to be ignored.
guardrail: Prioritize unresolved/pending/high-risk items; monitor alert burden and false positives.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

possible_failure_mode: Patient logs or wearables create noise and burden.
guardrail: Show trends and baseline changes, not raw streams by default.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

possible_failure_mode: Normal tests cause unresolved symptoms to be ignored.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

possible_failure_mode: Pending results/referrals have no accountable owner.
guardrail: Every pending item requires owner, due date, status, and escalation path.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

possible_failure_mode: Patient corrections silently overwrite clinical record or create medico-legal conflict.
guardrail: Use review queue; mark patient-reported vs clinician-verified; preserve audit trail.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

possible_failure_mode: System may reproduce dismissal patterns around gender, race, age, weight, disability, mental health, or language.
guardrail: Track dismissal/minimization signals carefully; audit outcomes; avoid accusatory language.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

possible_failure_mode: Product claims may move tool into regulated CDS/device territory.
guardrail: Define intended use carefully; maintain transparency and clinician review; get regulatory counsel.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues
